extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the “Against” rows, with 2 criminal proceedings against promoters and 1 against directors, while the company row shows Nil; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the company, promoters and directors are all Nil, and tax proceedings against the company are Nil (tax matters against promoters/directors were excluded).
